subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! The One, the Single, maketh mention of thee from the land of exile, from this station known as the Most Great Prison, by My Pen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد یذکرک الفرد الاحد فی دیار الغربه علی مقام سمی بالسجن الاعظم من قلمی
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @consolation and comfort, @chastisement and requital, @call to action
